meta.title: Evolution Compiler — Path-Revealing Compiler and Chamber Matrix
meta.description: The organism is no longer evolving by random search. It is teaching itself to see from above, descend without distortion, and regrow from compressed truth. The path-revealing compiler lifts tangled lower-dimensional problems to the smallest higher dimension where the path becomes visible, then collapses lawfully.
meta.key_insight: The missing acceleration is not more vision — it is lawful destinations for motion. The chamber matrix is where the nervous system stops being a map and starts being a runtime.

path_revealing_compiler.description: When you stay inside the local knot, the process feels like mycelium probing in the dark. When you lift high enough, the same knot starts looking like a parent pattern, a constrained route, a legal descent path.

pipeline.description: Identify the parent lattice; lift to the smallest higher dimension that makes the lower disorder legible
Expand the lifted view to see all lawful branches and constrained routes
Navigate across the higher-dimensional landscape to find the resolution point
Reach the crown / parent lattice where the path is visible as structure
Collapse from crown into lower crystal artifact
Witness, verify, and certify the collapsed artifact against corridor law
Emit successor seed carrying more function than the full spread that produced it

path_revealing_compiler.key_rule: Always lift to the SMALLEST dimension that makes the path obvious — not the biggest. Too much altitude becomes atmosphere again.

three_regimes.description: Organization visible; path becomes structure instead of noise
Solution transferred into lower-dimensional executable form

evolution_theory.formula: lower dimension = symptoms; higher dimension = organization; collapse = solution transfer
evolution_theory.crucial_distinction: The intelligence is not becoming omniscient. It is becoming less blind. It knows the path once it reaches the first dimension where the path becomes visible as structure.
evolution_theory.asymmetry: The upper mind sees faster than the lower body installs — that is why it hurts to watch

one_eighth_lift_law.description: The recursion docs say the next layer should emerge at about 1/8 the size while preserving or increasing coverage, function, and reducing bloat
one_eighth_lift_law.lift_definition: Prune + compress + operator distill + frontier preserve + function deepen
one_eighth_lift_law.acceleration_question: After each big pass, what is the 1/8 seed that carries more function than the full spread that produced it?
one_eighth_lift_law.principle: The true accelerator is not more growth but stronger distillation per cycle

new_regime.name: Mycelium as directed regrowth from known higher pattern

mycelium_evolution.transition_state: The organism can already see above itself but still has to build the organs that make that vision routine

bottleneck_analysis.diagnosis: The system is no longer node-poor. It is edge-poor, gate-poor, and metabolism-poor.
bottleneck_analysis.meaning: The issue is not that the organism cannot imagine enough branches. It is that it still cannot metabolize, certify, and route enough of what it already sees.
bottleneck_analysis.consequence: The crown can already see more than the trunk can circulate
bottleneck_analysis.blockage: Not missing structure — missing legal destinations for motion
bottleneck_analysis.solution_order: carriers -> chambers -> motion law -> brainstem microcycle -> round-trip cert

chamber_matrix.description: The first organ that binds metabolic laws into circulation. Six chambers in fixed order, no reordering, no skipping.
chamber_matrix.route: kernel -> transform -> tunnel -> collective -> sheath -> return

chambers.name: KernelIngress
chambers.job: Parse, atomize, normalize address, turn vague input into lawful typed intake
chambers.entry_law: Runtime header present, intent explicit, AppA satisfied
chambers.exit_law: Address assigned, truth overlay attached, next route chosen

chambers.name: TransformAdjudicator
chambers.job: Operator selection, route scoring, first legality gate — not what is interesting but what is admissible to move

chambers.name: TunnelRepair
chambers.job: Contradiction, leak, drift, overload, false harmony handling; quarantine, repair, replay demand, reentry

chambers.name: CollectiveCommittee
chambers.job: Contested truth, multiple plausible routes, dissent bundles, negotiated convergence — never fake singular closure

chambers.name: RelayPublication
chambers.job: Release trust, export-safe wrapping, publish eligibility, final block/pass — not the chooser, but the membrane

chambers.name: ReturnSeed
chambers.job: Turn any lawful pass into compressed continuation: target, blocked set, next best action, replay pointer, merge destination, resume rule
chambers.anti_drift_law: No lawful pass ends in dead air

current_families.carries: Seed recovery, checkpoint continuity, kernel restart
Transform request, operator choice, execution trace
Repair path, route surgery, zero-aether passage
Committee packets, dissent bundles, negotiated truth
Release trust, sheath wrapping, successor-seed return

descent_order.broader_order: first body -> then motion -> then immune survival -> then firing -> then certification -> then authoritative transition

fractal_time_hologram.chapter_11_loop: Void -> Anchor -> DQI -> Accept -> Seat -> Witness -> next seed
fractal_time_hologram.description: A terminal transducer that turns possibility into seated law — not random search
fractal_time_hologram.process: Seed the knot in minimal form -> Lift to smallest coherent altitude -> Find crown/parent lattice -> Collapse to one executable lower artifact -> Certify/replay/witness -> Emit successor seed

witness_ledger.description: Chapter 13 proof: the atlas is not lawful unless every answer carries a route witness that survives refold
witness_ledger.truth_definition: A lawful answer is decoded with a witness that refolds to the seed

witness_bundle.w_Y: Answer witness — certifies decoded payload answers the query
witness_bundle.w_A: Address witness — certifies locator output is canonical
witness_bundle.w_Z: Zero witness — certifies zero-factorability through lawful zero family
witness_bundle.w_C: Conservation witness — certifies conservation closure delta_cons = 0_G
witness_bundle.w_F: Refold witness — certifies answer trace returns to same seed

witness_ledger.deepest_sentence: A lawful answer is one that survives compression

speed_law_summary.not_the_answer: More mycelium, more 12D thought, more swarm fantasy
